name: Freeman Check Cashing INC
description_short: Freeman Check Cashing Inc is a check-cashing and money services provider in Manhattan's Upper West Side, open 24/7 with wheelchair accessibility.
description_long: Freeman Check Cashing Inc operates as a check-cashing and travelers checks services provider located at 3346 Broadway in New York, NY 10031, positioned at the intersection of W 136th St and W 135th St. The company appears to be part of a larger Freeman Check Cashing network with multiple locations across New York City, based on directory listings showing other Freeman-branded branches at different addresses. The business has established a presence in the financial services community serving the Upper Manhattan area. Freeman Check Cashing Inc primarily offers check-cashing services, travelers checks services, and money transfer capabilities to customers in the New York metropolitan area. According to directory listings, the company accepts major credit cards (MasterCard and Visa) for transactions and positions itself as accessible to individuals needing quick cash conversion from checks. The company operates as a travelers checks services provider, which indicates capacity to handle international payment instruments and related financial transactions. What distinguishes Freeman Check Cashing Inc is its 24-hour, 7-day-per-week operating schedule, providing round-the-clock access to check-cashing services—a significant advantage for customers with non-standard working hours or urgent financial needs. The location is wheelchair accessible, indicating commitment to serving customers with mobility considerations. The 24/7 availability sets it apart from many competitors in the check-cashing industry that operate limited hours. From an honest assessment perspective, the company has generated 139 visits in its listing period but maintains a neutral rating with zero customer reviews available on the directory platform. The lack of online presence (no website or email listed) and absence of customer feedback makes it difficult for prospective customers to evaluate service quality, fees, or customer satisfaction independently. The business operates in a competitive landscape with numerous other check-cashing providers in the same geographic area, some with established customer review histories. Without published pricing information, fee structures, or online verification capabilities, customers would need to call directly for service details.
pros: 24-hour, 7-day-per-week operation provides round-the-clock access to check-cashing services
Wheelchair accessible location accommodates customers with mobility needs
Located on Broadway corridor in Manhattan with established foot traffic area
Accepts major credit cards (MasterCard and Visa) for customer convenience
Part of established Freeman Check Cashing network with multiple NYC locations
Direct phone contact available for immediate service inquiries
cons: Zero customer reviews available on directory—no public feedback on service quality or fees
No online presence or website; cannot verify current operations, fees, or hours independently
No email contact option limits customer communication methods to phone only
Competitive local market with 32+ other check-cashing providers in New York City
Fees and service terms not publicly disclosed, requiring in-person or phone inquiry
best_for: Night shift and third-shift workers needing 24/7 check-cashing access
Customers in Upper Manhattan/Upper West Side seeking immediate check conversion
Individuals with mobility considerations requiring wheelchair-accessible service locations
People handling international payments via travelers checks
diagnosis: Freeman Check Cashing Inc is best suited for New York residents needing urgent, after-hours check-cashing services with accessible facilities in Upper Manhattan. The main caveat is the complete absence of online information, customer reviews, or publicly listed fees—making it impossible to assess service quality or pricing before calling directly.
